changes_made: Changed k8s_pod_image_vulnerability_scanning_enabled to k8s_image_vulnerability_scanning_enabled for correct resource categorization
review_notes: The control 6.2.3 is applicable to Kubernetes as it involves ensuring that systems are running supported versions and are patched for vulnerabilities. The function names mostly follow the naming conventions, but one function was incorrectly categorized under 'pod' instead of 'image'. The functions are technically accurate and map to real K8s security controls.
naming_improvements: Ensure resource categorization is accurate, such as using 'image' for image-related checks.
title: Requirement 6.2.3
step1_reasoning: The control 6.2.3 focuses on ensuring that systems are running supported versions and are patched for vulnerabilities. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring the cluster is running a supported version, images are scanned for vulnerabilities, and pods adhere to security standards to mitigate risks from outdated or vulnerable software.
